content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — Push entitlement (App/DealAlerts.entitlements:3) is used to auto-schedule hourly repeating notifications (NotificationScheduler.swift:8-13) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications" (description.txt:3), matching Apple's spam-push pattern.
Pierre: Apple explicitly bans push notifications used for promotional spam or unsolicited frequent alerts not tied to a discrete user action, and this scheduler fires hourly indefinitely without any user opt-in granularity, while the store listing brags about "unlimited" hourly alerts — a near-verbatim match to the guideline's forbidden pattern. Fix by letting users configure alert frequency/topics, requiring explicit consent per alert type, and rewriting the marketing copy to avoid promising uncontrolled notification volume, or this app is likely to be rejected under 4.5.1.
